# beaconAI

> AI Implementation & Strategy Consulting for Small and Mid-Sized Businesses

beaconAI helps businesses with 10-500 employees implement AI that delivers real ROI. Founded by Dale Myska, a former Fortune 50 operations leader and MIT AI Executive Academy graduate.

## Services

- AI Readiness Assessment: Free 12-question assessment with instant AI readiness score and personalized report
- AI Strategy Session: Free 30-minute consultation to review assessment results and identify highest-impact AI opportunities
- AI Strategy & Roadmap Development: Custom implementation roadmap aligned to business objectives and budget
- Process Mapping & AI Agent Deployment: Identify and automate biggest time-wasters with custom AI agents
- AI Training & Workshops: Hands-on sessions to get teams comfortable and productive with AI tools
- Fractional AI Leadership: Ongoing strategic AI guidance without the full-time cost
